name: Brazilian Baked Bananas
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C).
2. Place the bananas, cut side down, on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
3. Bake for about 10 minutes or until dark and tender.
4. Remove from the oven and split open each banana.
5. Spoon approximately 1 tablespoon of butter into each half.
6. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
